member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Annotations.FromFormBody
member.summary: From Form Body. Using a specialized , that allows json post with a form. Use when both files and json body are needed for parameters to a controller action.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirective.IsNone
member.summary: Is None. Adds the 'none' source. All other sources are ignored.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirective.Sources
member.summary: Sources. Adds the array of custom sources.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowForms
member.summary: Allow Forms. Allows the page to submit forms. If this keyword is not used, this operation is not allowed.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowModals
member.summary: Allow Modals. Allows the page to open modal windows.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowOrientationLock
member.summary: Allow Orientation Lock. Allows the page to disable the ability to lock the screen orientation.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowPointerLock
member.summary: Allow Pointer Lock. Allows the page to use the Pointer Lock API.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowPopups
member.summary: Allow Popups. Allows popups (like from window.open, target= "_blank", showModalDialog). If this keyword is not used, that functionality will silently fail.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowPopupsToEscapeSandbox
member.summary: Allow Popups To Escape Sandbox. Allows a sandboxed document to open new windows without forcing the sandboxing flags upon them. This will allow, for example, a third-party advertisement to be safely sandboxed without forcing the same restrictions upon a landing page.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowPresentation
member.summary: Allow Presentation. Allows embedders to have control over whether an iframe can start a presentation session.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowSameOrigin
member.summary: Allow Same Origin. Allows the content to be treated as being from its normal origin. If this keyword is not used, the embedded content is treated as being from a unique origin.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowScripts
member.summary: Allow Scripts. Allows the page to run scripts (but not create pop-up windows). If this keyword is not used, this operation is not allowed.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectiveSandbox.AllowTopNavigation
member.summary: Allow Top Navigation. Allows the page to navigate (load) content to the top-level browsing context. If this keyword is not used, this operation is not allowed.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Accelerometer
member.summary: Accelerometer. Controls whether the current document is allowed to gather information about the acceleration of the device through the Accelerometer interface.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.AmbientLightSensor
member.summary: Ambient Light Sensor. Controls whether the current document is allowed to gather information about the amount of light in the environment around the device through the AmbientLightSensor interface.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.AutoPlay
member.summary: Auto Play. Controls whether the current document is allowed to autoplay media requested through the HTMLMediaElement interface. When this policy is disabled and there were no user gestures, the Promise returned by HTMLMediaElement.play() will reject with a DOMException. The autoplay attribute on audio and video elements will be ignored.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Battery
member.summary: Battery. Controls whether the use of the Battery Status API is allowed. When this policy is disabled, the Promise returned by Navigator.getBattery() will reject with a NotAllowedError DOMException.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Camera
member.summary: Camera. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use video input devices. When this policy is disabled, the Promise returned by getUserMedia() will reject with a NotAllowedError DOMException.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.DisplayCapture
member.summary: Display Capture. Controls whether the current document is permitted to use the getDisplayMedia() method to capture screen contents. When this policy is disabled, the promise returned by getDisplayMedia() will reject with a NotAllowedError if permission is not obtained to capture the display's contents.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.DocumentDomain
member.summary: Document Domain. Controls whether the current document is allowed to set document.domain. When this policy is disabled, attempting to set document.domain will fail and cause a SecurityError DOMException to be thrown.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.EncryptedMedia
member.summary: Encrypted Media. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the Encrypted Media Extensions API (EME). When this policy is disabled, the Promise returned by Navigator.requestMediaKeySystemAccess() will reject with a DOMException.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.ExecutionWhileNotRendered
member.summary: Execution While Not Rendered. Controls whether tasks should execute in frames while they're not being rendered (e.g. if an iframe is hidden or display: none).

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.ExecutionWhileOutOfViewport
member.summary: Execution While Out Of Viewport. Controls whether tasks should execute in frames while they're outside the visible viewport.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.FullScreen
member.summary: FullScreen. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use Element.requestFullScreen(). When this policy is disabled, the returned Promise rejects with a TypeError.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Gamepad
member.summary: Gamepad. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the Gamepad API. When this policy is disabled, calls to Navigator.getGamepads() will throw a SecurityError DOMException, and the gamepadconnected and gamepaddisconnected events will not fire.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Geolocation
member.summary: Geo location. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the Geolocation Interface. When this policy is disabled, calls to getCurrentPosition() and watchPosition() will cause those functions' callbacks to be invoked with a GeolocationPositionError code of PERMISSION_DENIED.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Gyroscope
member.summary: Gyroscope. Controls whether the current document is allowed to gather information about the orientation of the device through the Gyroscope interface.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.LayoutAnimations
member.summary: Layout Animations. Controls whether the current document is allowed to show layout animations.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.LegacyImageFormats
member.summary: Legacy Image Formats. Controls whether the current document is allowed to display images in legacy formats.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Magnetometer
member.summary: Magnetometer. Controls whether the current document is allowed to gather information about the orientation of the device through the Magnetometer interface.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Microphone
member.summary: Microphone. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use audio input devices. When this policy is disabled, the Promise returned by MediaDevices.getUserMedia() will reject with a NotAllowedError.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Midi
member.summary: Midi. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the Web MIDI API. When this policy is disabled, the Promise returned by Navigator.requestMIDIAccess() will reject with a DOMException.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.NavigationOverride
member.summary: Navigation Override. Controls the availability of mechanisms that enables the page author to take control over the behavior of spatial navigation, or to cancel it outright.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.OversizedImages
member.summary: Oversized Images. Controls whether the current document is allowed to download and display large images.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Payment
member.summary: Payment. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the Payment Request API. When this policy is enabled, the PaymentRequest() constructor will throw a SecurityError DOMException.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.PictureInPicture
member.summary: Picture In Picture. Controls whether the current document is allowed to play a video in a Picture-in-Picture mode via the corresponding API.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.PublicKeyCredentialsGet
member.summary: Public Key Credentials Get. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the Web Authentication API to retrieve already stored public-key credentials, i.e. via navigator.credentials.get({publicKey: ..., ...}).

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.SpeakerSelection
member.summary: Speaker Selection. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the Audio Output Devices API to list and select speakers.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.SyncXhr
member.summary: Sync Xhr. Controls whether the current document is allowed to make synchronous XMLHttpRequest requests.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.UnoptimizedImages
member.summary: Unoptimized Images. Controls whether the current document is allowed to download and display unoptimized images.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.UnsizedMedia
member.summary: Unsized Media. Controls whether the current document is allowed to change the size of media elements after the initial layout is complete.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.Usb
member.summary: Usb. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the WebUSB API

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.ScreenWakeLock
member.summary: Screen Wake Lock. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use Screen Wake Lock API to indicate that device should not turn off or dim the screen.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.WebShare
member.summary: Web Share. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the Navigator.share() of Web Share API to share text, links, images, and other content to arbitrary destinations of user's choice, e.g. mobile apps.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.XrSpatialTracking
member.summary: Xr Spatial Tracking. Controls whether the current document is allowed to use the WebXR Device API to interact with a WebXR session.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyAmbientLightSensor
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Ambient Light Sensor

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyDisplayCapture
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Display Capture.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyDocumentDomain
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Document Domain.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyEncryptedMedia
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Encrypted Media.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyExecutionWhileNotRendered
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Execution While Not Rendered.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyExecutionWhileOutOfViewport
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Execution While Out Of Viewport.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyGeolocation
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Geo location.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyLayoutAnimations
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Layout Animations.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyLegacyImageFormats
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Legacy Image Formats.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyNavigationOverride
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Navigation Override.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyOversizedImages
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Oversized Images.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyPublicKeyCredentialsGet
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Public Key Credentials Get.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicySyncXhr
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Sync Xhr.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyUnoptimizedImages
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Unoptimized Images.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyUnsizedMedia
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Unsized Media.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyScreenWakeLock
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Screen Wake Lock.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyWebShare
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Web Share.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Config.CspOptions.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicy.CspDirectivePermissionsPolicyXrSpatialTracking
member.summary: Csp Directive Permissions Policy Xr Spatial Tracking.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.ReferrerPolicy.Disabled
member.summary: Specifies that the Referrer-Policy header should not be set in the HTTP response.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.ReferrerPolicy.NoReferrer
member.summary: Enables the no-referrer policy, instructing the browser to not send referrer information.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.ReferrerPolicy.NoReferrerWhenDowngrade
member.summary: Enables the no-referrer-when-downgrade policy, instructing the browser to send full referrer information unless navigation is from HTTPS->HTTP.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.ReferrerPolicy.SameOrigin
member.summary: Enables the same-origin policy, instructing the browser to send full referrer information for same-origin requests and no referrer for cross-origin requests.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.ReferrerPolicy.Origin
member.summary: Enables the origin policy, instructing the browser to send origin (no path and query) as referrer information for both same-origin and cross-origin requests.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.ReferrerPolicy.StrictOrigin
member.summary: Enables the strict-origin policy, instructing the browser to send origin (no path and query) as referrer information for both same-origin and cross-origin HTTPS -> HTTPS and HTTP -> HTTP requests. HTTPS -> HTTP requests will not include referrer information.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.ReferrerPolicy.OriginWhenCrossOrigin
member.summary: Enables the origin-when-cross-origin policy, instructing the browser to send full referrer information for same-origin requests and origin (no path and query) as referrer information for cross-origin requests (includes HTTPS -> HTTP and HTTP -> HTTPS).

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.ReferrerPolicy.StrictOriginWhenCrossOrigin
member.summary: Enables the strict-origin-when-cross-origin policy, instructing the browser to send full referrer information for same-origin requests and origin (no path and query) as referrer information for cross-origin requests. Referrer information is not sent for HTTPS -> HTTP requests.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.ReferrerPolicy.UnsafeUrl
member.summary: Enables the unsafe-url policy, instructing the browser to send full referrer information for all requests. Note that this will leak full referrer information for HTTPS -> HTTP requests, which is even more unsafe than default browser behaviour.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.XFrameOptionsPolicy.Disabled
member.summary: Specifies that the X-Frame-Options header should not be set in the HTTP response.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.XFrameOptionsPolicy.Deny
member.summary: Specifies that the X-Frame-Options header should be set in the HTTP response, instructing the browser to not display the page when it is loaded in an iframe.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.XFrameOptionsPolicy.SameOrigin
member.summary: Specifies that the X-Frame-Options header should be set in the HTTP response, instructing the browser to display the page when it is loaded in an iframe - but only if the iframe is from the same origin as the page.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.XXssProtectionPolicyBlockMode.Disabled
member.summary: Disabled. Specifies that the X-Xss-Protection header should not be set in the HTTP response.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.XXssProtectionPolicyBlockMode.FilterDisabled
member.summary: Filter Disabled. Specifies that the X-Xss-Protection header should be set in the HTTP response, explicitly disabling the IE XSS filter.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.XXssProtectionPolicyBlockMode.FilterEnabled
member.summary: Filter Enabled. Specifies that the X-Xss-Protection header should be set in the HTTP response, explicitly enabling the IE XSS filter.

member.name: F:Nano.App.Web.Config.Enums.XXssProtectionPolicyBlockMode.FilterEnabledBlockMode
member.summary: Filter Enabled Block Mode. Specifies that the X-Xss-Protection header should be set in the HTTP response, explicitly enabling the IE XSS filter. BlockMode is set to true.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HealthCheckOptions.EvaluationInterval
member.summary: Evaluation Interval. The interval between health-checks.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HealthCheckOptions.FailureNotificationInterval
member.summary: Failure Notification Timout. The minimum number of secoends betweeen failure notificaitons.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HealthCheckOptions.MaximumHistoryEntriesPerEndpoint
member.summary: Maximum History Entries Per Endpoint. The maximum number of historical entries per endpoint in the UI database.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HostingOptions.UseHttpsRequired
member.summary: Use Https Redirect. Forces https for all requests.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HostingOptions.UseForwardedHeaders
member.summary: Use Forwarded Headers. Enables forwarded headers, when application is behind a proxy.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HostingOptions.UseResponseCompression
member.summary: Use Response Compression. Enables middleware for dynamic compression of http responses.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HstsOptions.UsePreload
member.summary: Use Preload. Adds the preload directive, defaults to false. Max-age must be at least 18 weeks, and includeSubdomains must be enabled to use the preload directive.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HstsOptions.IncludeSubdomains
member.summary: Include Subdomains. Adds includeSubDomains in the header, defaults to false

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HttpPolicyHeaderOptions.UseContentTypeOptionsNoSniff
member.summary: Use Content Type Options. Added X-Content-Type Options header.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.HttpPolicyHeaderOptions.Robots
member.summary: Robots. Settings for robots (search engines) behavior.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.RobotsOptions.UseNoIndex
member.summary: Use No Index. Instructs search engines to not index the page

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.RobotsOptions.UseNoFollow
member.summary: Use No Follow Instructs search engines to not follow links on the page

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.RobotsOptions.UseNoSnippet
member.summary: Use No Snippet. Instructs search engines to not display a snippet for the page in search results

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.RobotsOptions.UseNoArchive
member.summary: Use No Archive. Instructs search engines to not offer a cached version of the page in search results

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.RobotsOptions.UseNoOdp
member.summary: Use No ODP. Instructs search engines to not use information from the Open Directory Project for the page’s title or snippet

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.RobotsOptions.UseNoTranslate
member.summary: Use No Translate - Instructs search engines to not offer translation of the page in search results (Google only)

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.RobotsOptions.UseNoImageIndex
member.summary: Use No Image Index. Instructs search engines to not index images on the page (Google only)

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.ApiOptions.ShutdownTimeout
member.summary: Shutdown Timeout. The number of seconds the application waits after receiving a SIGTERM signal, before shutting down.

member.name: P:Nano.App.Web.Config.ApiOptions.ResponseCache
member.summary: Response Cache. Options for caching responses.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.LogIn,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates and signs in a user. On success a jwt-token is created and returned, for use with auhtorization.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInRootAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.LogInRoot,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates and signs in the root user from configuration. On success a jwt-token is created and returned, for use with auhtorization.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInExternalDirectAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.LogInExternalDirect,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign-in a user, from data received from a separate authentication.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInExternalDirectTransientAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.LogInExternalDirect,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign-in a user, from data received from a separate authentication.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInExternalGoogleAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.LogInExternalGoogle,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign-in a user, from external Google authentication using auth-code flow.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInExternalGoogleTransientAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.LogInExternalGoogle,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign-in a user transient, from external Google authentication using auth-code flow.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInExternalFacebookAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.LogInExternalFacebook,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign-in a user transient, from external Facebook authentication using auth-code flow.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInExternalFacebookTransientAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.LogInExternalFacebook,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign-in a user transient, from external Facebook authentication using auth-code flow.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInExternalMicrosoftAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.LogInExternalMicrosoft,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign-in a user, from external Microsoft authentication using auth-code flow.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInExternalMicrosoftTransientAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.LogInExternalMicrosoft,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign-in a user transient, from external Microsoft authentication using auth-code flow.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.LogInRefreshExternalAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.LogInExternalTransientRefresh,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Refreshes a user's external token and token.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.GetExternalSchemesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all the configured external authentication schemes. E.g. Google, Facebook, etc.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.GetExternalLoginDataGoogleAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.Providers.ExternalLoginProviderGoogle,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get external login data from an external Google authentication provider.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.GetExternalLoginDataFaceBookAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.Providers.ExternalLoginProviderFacebook,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get external login data from an external Facebook authentication provider.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseAuthController`1.GetExternalLoginDataMicrosoftAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.Providers.ExternalLoginProviderMicrosoft,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get external login data from an external Microsoft authentication provider.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseControllerCreatable`4
member.summary: Base abstract , implementing methods for instances of .

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseControllerCreatable`4.CreateAsync(`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The token used when request is cancelled.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseControllerCreatable`4.CreateAndGetAsync(`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create the passed model, and reload.
member.param: The token used when request is cancelled.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseControllerCreatable`4.CreateManyAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`1},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The token used when request is cancelled.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseControllerCreatable`4.CreateManyBulkAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`1},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The token used when request is cancelled.

member.name: T:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseControllerDeletable`4
member.summary: Base abstract , implementing methods for instances of .

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseControllerDeletable`4.DeleteAsync(`2,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete the model with the passed identifier.
member.param: The identifier of the model to delete.
The token used when request is cancelled.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseControllerDeletable`4.DeleteManyAsync(`2[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete the models with the passed identifiers.
member.param: The identifiers of the models to delete.
The token used when request is cancelled.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseControllerDeletable`4.DeleteManyBulkAsync(`2[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete the models with the passed identifiers bulk.
member.param: The identifiers of the models to delete.
The token used when request is cancelled.

member.summary: Deletes the models matching the passed 'select' criteria.

member.returns: Whether the email address is already taken.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseIdentityController`4.SignUpExternalDirectAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.SignUpExternalDirect{`1,`2},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign-up a user based on external login data directly. This can be used when the external provider is verified separately, and the data is passed instead of retrieved from the external provider.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseIdentityController`4.SignUpExternalGoogleAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.SignUpExternalGoogle{`1,`2},System.Threading.CancellationToken)

member.summary: Sign-up a user based on external Microsoft logIn provider.

member.summary: Sets the emailAddress of a user.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseIdentityController`4.SetPasswordAsync(Nano.Data.Abstractions.Identity.Models.SetPassword{`2},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sets the password of a user. Only use to set a password for a user without one. Users authenticated with external logIn providers, doesn't initially have a password.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Controllers.BaseIdentityController`4.ResetPasswordAsync(Nano.Data.Abstractions.Identity.Models.ResetPassword{`2},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resets the password of a user.

member.summary: Get the password reset token, used to change the password of a user.

member.summary: Changes the password of a user.

member.summary: Confirms the email address of a user.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Identity.Abstractions.IAuthTransientRepository.LogInRootTransientAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.LogInRoot)
member.summary: Signs in the admin user statically. The login is transient, no Identity store is used.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Identity.Abstractions.IAuthTransientRepository.GetExternalProviderSchemesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all the configured external logins schemes.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Identity.Abstractions.IAuthTransientRepository.LogInExternalTransientAsync``1(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.External.BaseLogInExternal{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Signs in a user, from external login. The login is transient, no Identity backing store is used. The login relies on the external login provider being valid.

member.name: M:Nano.App.Web.Identity.Abstractions.IAuthTransientRepository.LogInExternalTransientAsync(Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.ExternalLogInData,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Signs in a user, from external login. The login is transient, no Identity backing store is used. The login relies on the external login provider being valid.
member.param: The roles added to the token.
The claims added to the token.

member.summary: The user authenticates and on success recieves a jwt token for use with auhtorization.

member.summary: The user authenticates and on success recieves a jwt token for use with auhtorization.

member.summary: Creates a , ready to and . The application startup implementation is defaulted to .
